title: athyrium triangulare
intro: Athyrium triangulare, also known as the lady fern or triangular lady fern, is a type of deciduous, terrestrial fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Athyrium triangulare include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, tincture, or infusement to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
